title: Rajendra Rao
summary: Landmark judgment on digital evidence admissibility under IPC and CrPC sections. Court recognized digital trails as valid primary evidence, significantly impacting cybercrime investigations.

title: Umesh Bhatt
summary: Guidelines issued on the procedure to be followed when recording witness statements. The court emphasized Section 161 CrPC must be followed strictly to ensure fair trial.

title: Asha Kumari
summary: Clarified jurisdiction boundaries in cybercrime FIRs. Case set precedent for cross-border investigation protocols and how territorial jurisdiction applies to online crimes.

title: Ravi Prasad
summary: Court observed procedural lapses in FIR registration and ruled for compensation due to police delay. Case reinforced accountability under CrPC procedural standards.

title: Nisha Yadav
summary: Judgment emphasized citizen privacy in FIR publication. Introduced guidelines for redaction of sensitive information before publishing FIRs online.
